summary: Verified P1 batch (Phantom Connect button, Solana sweep endpoints, PerfSparkline, ForgotPassword toast). Backend: 10/10 pytest tests passed. Frontend: PhantomConnectButton renders in landing nav (>=1024px) AND inside treasury-phantom-connect-card. Treasury panel shows all 3 new cards (phantom-connect, perf-sparkline, sweep-old-wallet) above existing config/ledger sections. Sweep balance flow works end-to-end with valid devnet read; build-instructions button correctly disabled when balance=0. ForgotPasswordPage loads cleanly with no compile overlay.

console_warnings.message: TypeError: e is not a function in la.initialize (bundle.js:764215)
console_warnings.impact: Non-blocking. Button still renders 'Connect Wallet' correctly. Likely SDK warning trying to talk to connect.phantom.app before user gesture.

critical_code_review_comments: PhantomConnectProvider triggers an outbound init call to connect.phantom.app at mount which logs a console TypeError (likely SDK internal). Cosmetic only; consider wrapping init in try/catch and silencing in console once the SDK stabilizes.
PerfSparkline meta showed '17 routes · 47 samples' on first visit and '66 samples' a few seconds later — confirms the 30s polling is working and routes get sampled by recent admin traffic.
Sweep card UX: when balance == 0 the 'Generate Sweep' button is correctly disabled, but a tooltip explaining why would help admins.
seed_data_creation: None — used real devnet wallet 8fn1G5eUx...58mph (treasury) and 5jtHuHRJxoYBVyVuAok7gkStf53HjKdN3CA9AdWC8J9r (different valid wallet) for sweep tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests cover: GET /api/admin/solana-indexer/sweep-balance (401/400/200), POST /api/admin/solana-indexer/sweep-instructions (401/400 same-wallet/400 invalid/200 valid), GET /api/admin/perf-snapshot (401/200 + p95 desc sort), GET /api/admin/solana-indexer/status (treasury_wallet=8fn1G5eUx...58mph). Frontend: PhantomConnectButton in landing nav at desktop, hidden <1024px; treasury panel renders treasury-phantom-connect-card, treasury-perf-sparkline-card, sweep-old-wallet-card in order; sweep balance flow works for valid devnet wallets. ForgotPasswordPage loads cleanly. Phantom OAuth flow itself was NOT tested (out of scope per main agent — domain not verified yet).
verified_features: Backend sweep-balance endpoint shape + auth + validation
Backend sweep-instructions endpoint shape (memo=GVZ-SWEEP-YYYYMMDD format, instructions array, from/to/amount fields)
Backend perf-snapshot endpoint shape + p95 desc sort
PhantomConnectButton renders in landing nav at >=1024px viewport, hidden at <1024px
Treasury panel renders 3 new cards (treasury-phantom-connect-card, treasury-perf-sparkline-card, sweep-old-wallet-card) above existing MTD/all-time/config/ledger sections
PerfSparkline polls /api/admin/perf-snapshot every 30s — verified live samples count incrementing (47 -> 66) and rows sorted by p95 desc
SweepOldWalletCard input + check balance + readout flow works end-to-end against real devnet wallet
ForgotPasswordPage loads without compile overlay; email + submit elements present
